ajustesbluetooth: Do not have a Gamepad connected? Open Bluetooth Settings
permisosdescripcion:
* Microphone: Possible use of CreaGameBox apps (ignore if your device does not have)
* Camera: Possible use of CreaGameBox apps (ignore if your device does not have)
* Storage: to save files from CreaGameBox apps such as Images or get for custom wallpaper, customization features and more!
